title: HEAD TEACHER'S MESSAGE
name: MULAMOGI BASHIR
message_preview: I am delighted to welcome you to our school. There is something very unique about Sir Apollo Kaggwa- Kitintale that we are incredibly proud of our children, supportive parents, inspirational staff where all are committed to excel in all spheres as the school motto outlines.
image_alt: Portrait of Head Teacher SERUYANGE MATHIAS
